daily_fact: Stay engaged with your community through local news and civic participation.
topline_md: In recent New York City news, a 69-year-old woman was killed in a hit-and-run, two teenage girls were shot in Brooklyn, and the NYU faculty strike continues as negotiations stall; meanwhile, Mayor Mamdani faces challenges over rental assistance and the city prepares for a crucial budget deadline.

risks_alerts.title: Risks & Alerts
risks_alerts.summary_md:
### Risks & Alerts

- 69-year-old woman dead after apparent hit and run near Midtown East, New York City. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
